howItWorks.intro: This precious metal storage cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Annual Storage Cost
rules.formula: Cost = Metal Value x Annual Rate (with minimums)
rules.explanation: Most vaults charge a percentage of value with minimum annual fees.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What is the cheapest way to store precious metals?
faq.a: Home storage is cheapest but riskiest. For larger holdings ($50k+), a private vault with insurance is typically 0.4-0.5% per year and far more secure.

faq.q: Does silver cost more to store than gold?
faq.a: Yes, because silver has a lower value-to-weight ratio. Storing $50,000 in silver takes roughly 100x more space than $50,000 in gold.
